creator: mph@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Imported with minor changes: 
- Modify patch-aa to respect CC and CFLAGS 
- Do not install docs if NOPORTDOCS is defined. 
- INSTALL_MAN is literally for man pages; other docs use INSTALL_DATA. 
As shipped, both expand to the same command, but it's a style issue. 

Your name has been added to the Handbook for your contribution.  Thanks! 

PS- If you get a clarification on the licensing terms, please notify 
us so that we can remove RESTRICTED, or clarify ports/LEGAL, or whatever 
is appropriate.
